# Setting Up a Subscription

To set up a subscription with Acme Shop, log into your account, navigate to the desired product page, and select "Subscribe & Save" or "Auto-Replenishment" next to the purchase button. Choose a replenishment frequency, confirm your shipping and payment details, and you will receive a confirmation email outlining your subscription. Modifications or cancellations can be made in the "My Subscriptions" section, and while there are no extra fees, discounts may apply, though some promotions might not be valid for subscription orders. Customer support is available 24/7 for any inquiries.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#setting-up-a-subscription]
